name: Stickman Gun Shooter 3D
description: Warning: contains blood and shooting!! You are a stickman!!!! Kill and snipe the enemy stickmen - you have to strike first or they will kill you! How long will you survive the before you are dead? In this amazing 3D shooter game, there will be everything you ever wanted: Features - Fully 3D stickman and level - Blood!! Lots of Blooood effects! - Ragdoll / physics based death animations - Many Weapons! guns, a shotgun, a machine gun, mp5, m16, ak-47, uzi - Hours of shooting fun! - Lots of death! Instructions - Try to not die for as long as possible! :) Every enemy stickman should fear you, as you hunt down and shoot them. Music:dem0lecule-Global-Mechanization
instructions: WASD ARROWS - Move CTRL- Shoot Space- Jump G- Grenade
tags: 1 Player, 3D, 3D Games, Gun, Kill, Killing, Shoot, Shoot 'Em Up, Shooter, Shooting, Stickman, Unity3D, weapons
